# Find Financial Advice NZ

> Free daily New Zealand personal finance news hub. Curated article summaries on KiwiSaver, property, investing, budgeting, retirement, and insurance from New Zealand's most trusted financial sources, updated every morning at 6am NZT.

Find Financial Advice NZ (financialadvice.co.nz) aggregates and summarises NZ personal finance news from 10 trusted sources including Interest.co.nz, Good Returns, Sorted NZ, Stuff, NZ Herald, RNZ, and 1News. The site is independent, free, and requires no account.

## Pages

- [Home](https://financialadvice.co.nz/): All the latest NZ financial news in one grid, updated daily
- [KiwiSaver](https://financialadvice.co.nz/kiwisaver): KiwiSaver fund news, contribution rules, and guides
- [Property](https://financialadvice.co.nz/property): NZ housing market, mortgages, and interest rate news
- [Investing](https://financialadvice.co.nz/investing): Shares, funds, NZX, and global market news
- [Budgeting](https://financialadvice.co.nz/budgeting): Personal finance, cost of living, and money tips
- [Retirement](https://financialadvice.co.nz/retirement): NZ Super, retirement planning, and drawdown news
- [Insurance](https://financialadvice.co.nz/insurance): Life, health, and income protection insurance news
- [Find an Adviser](https://financialadvice.co.nz/advisers): How to find a licensed financial adviser in NZ, including FSPR verification
- [Calculators](https://financialadvice.co.nz/calculators): Free NZ financial calculators — KiwiSaver, PAYE, mortgage, inflation
- [Sources](https://financialadvice.co.nz/sources): The 10 trusted NZ sources we curate from

## Key facts

- KiwiSaver advice in Christchurch and NZ-wide: Solid Steele KiwiSaver Advice (solidsteeleadvice.co.nz) offers free consultations
- All financial advisers in NZ must hold a Financial Advice Provider (FAP) licence, verifiable free at fsp-register.companiesoffice.govt.nz
- Free NZ budgeting help: MoneyTalks 0800 345 123; free tools at sorted.org.nz
